description_long: This arcade game cabinet, titled 'Princess Quest II', features a classic upright design with a predominantly black body accented by bold red trim. The front panel includes a large rectangular screen, a control panel with a joystick and two colored buttons, and a coin door below. The side panels are decorated with a whimsical illustration of a glowing princess holding a lantern, set against a shadowy castle backdrop, adding a fantasy theme to the cabinet. The marquee at the top displays the game title in white text on a dark background, illuminated for visibility. The cabinet appears to be constructed from wood or MDF with a laminate finish, and the control panel is likely made of plastic and metal components. The overall build is sturdy and designed for public or arcade use, with a hard, smooth surface and vibrant, eye-catching artwork.
description: A classic upright arcade game cabinet with red trim, fantasy-themed side art, and a 'Princess Quest II' marquee. Features a joystick, buttons, and a large screen on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Princess Quest II' marquee, large screen, control panel with joystick and buttons, and coin door.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the princess and lantern artwork against a castle silhouette, with red trim outlining the cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain black back panel with ventilation slots and no visible artwork or controls.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same princess and lantern artwork and red trim.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, flat front, medium size with a visible bezel around the display area
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick (yellow ball top) and two buttons (blue and red) arranged in a row, with a simple color scheme and no visible markings
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the text 'Princess Quest II' in white on a dark background, illuminated, with a simple and bold style
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels feature a glowing princess holding a lantern, set against a dark castle silhouette, with a fantasy and adventure theme in yellow, black, and red tones
